active_checklist: Align SensibLaw StatiBaker task extraction with the runsheet bridge.

lane_claim: Manager repair rerun: close stale SensibLaw StatiBaker extraction lane, update runsheet/status explicitly, preserve authority rules, and run focused tests; may spawn up to six leaf workers.
last_deescalation_rule: De-escalate once ambiguity collapses and the work reduces to a narrow bounded edit set.

notes: Lane ownership: SensibLaw/src/statibaker_kanban.py and focused SensibLaw tests/fixtures only. Do not own Kanboard RPC code. Ensure build_task_memory_index/project_kanban/build_task_timeline_probe can feed the bridge model or clearly report the missing adapter boundary. Preserve authority rules: structural task evidence only; no keyword-only promotion. Preferred model: gpt-5.1-codex-max if code changes span extraction semantics; gpt-5.1-codex-mini for fixture/test-only work.
